title: THREE.Object3D
description: A serialized three.js Object3D node as produced by Object3D.toJSON(). Object3D is the base class for nearly all 3D-positioned entities — Mesh, Group, Line, Points, Camera, Light, Bone, Skeleton, etc.

uuid.description: Stable identifier for this node, auto-assigned when the Object3D is constructed.

name.description: Optional human-readable name. Useful for lookups via Object3D.getObjectByName().

matrix.description: Local transformation matrix in column-major order (16 numbers).

up.description: The up direction used by lookAt(). Defaults to Object3D.DEFAULT_UP which is [0, 1, 0].

visible.description: Whether the object is rendered. Defaults to true.

frustumCulled.description: When true (default) the object is culled by the camera frustum before rendering.

renderOrder.description: Override default rendering order; lower values render first.

userData.description: Free-form object for caller-defined application data; survives serialization.

layers.description: Layers bitmask controlling which cameras can see the object.

geometry.description: UUID reference into the top-level `geometries` array (Mesh / Line / Points / SkinnedMesh).

material.description: UUID or array of UUIDs referencing materials in the top-level `materials` array.
